message:
🐛 Fix blank cards by adding quick timeout for static/demo cards (#549)

Cards that don't use useCardLoadingState (static content, demo data, games)
were showing blank until the 5-second skeleton timeout. This adds a 150ms
initialRenderTimedOut timer that assumes content is ready for non-reporting
cards, fixing the blank card issue without modifying 140+ individual cards.

Changes:
- Add 150ms initialRenderTimedOut for quick detection of static cards
- Include isDemoMode in skeleton prevention (not just isDemoData prop)
- Add 300ms collapseDelayPassed to ensure content is visible before collapse
- Update effectiveIsLoading and effectiveHasData to use quick timeout

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
